name: English Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, stirring until all sugar is dissolved.
3. Continue boiling without stirring until the mixture turns a dark golden color.
4. Test by spooning a few drops into cold water; it should harden instantly into a crisp ball.
5. Turn off the heat and pour the toffee into an oiled pan to form a layer about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Allow to cool completely, then break into squares with a hammer.
7. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 1.5 pounds.
